overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street in the morning light. The player character navigates from a busy intersection into a narrow sidewalk corridor lined with red brick buildings and digital billboards, eventually reaching a crosswalk with a view of a massive building under construction. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with warm golden-hour lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway ramps

events.description: dark sedan car passes through the intersection from left to right
turns left from the open intersection onto the narrow sidewalk corridor

agents.ego_description: turning left from the street intersection onto the sidewalk, navigating around the corner of the red building

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the camera

entered.detail: large red billboard with white '35TV' text mounted on building facade
tall building featuring large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
raised concrete highway structure with metal railings spanning across the background
multi-story red brick commercial building with external air conditioning units and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection with a prominent red 35TV billboard visible on the right. A dark sedan passes through the intersection as the camera turns left onto a narrow sidewalk, transitioning from the open street into a corridor formed by the red brick building on the right and the street on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk corridor between street and red brick building

events.description: pedestrian in red clothing walks past the camera on the right, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk between the red brick building and the street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking toward the camera, passing by on the right side

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the building across the street displaying colorful graphics
tall black street lamps with horizontal light bars lining the edge of the sidewalk
scattered litter and debris accumulated along the base of the red building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed sidewalk corridor with the red brick building facade on the right and the street on the left. Digital billboards illuminate the building across the street while pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The camera moves past street lamps and scattered debris along the building wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with construction site view

events.description: exits the enclosed sidewalk corridor into a wide open intersection with clear view of the mega building under construction
arrives at the crosswalk and stops at the red traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk as the corridor opens up, approaching the crosswalk and slowing to stop at the traffic signal

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white 'Hanford' text mounted on a black pole
massive multi-tiered building under heavy construction with multiple cranes and exposed framework dominating the skyline
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated and pedestrian crossing signal
elevated highway overpass with complex support columns and curved ramps

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk corridor opens up to reveal a wide urban intersection with the massive Hanford construction site visible in the distance. The camera approaches the crosswalk, passing under the Hanford street sign, and stops at the red traffic light. The mega building under construction with its cranes and complex architecture dominates the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: crosswalk at major intersection with construction site view

events.description: stream of vehicles including sedans and vans pass through the intersection from left to right
white van and sports car drive past the crosswalk as the camera waits

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic light to change, observing the flow of vehicles and the construction site ahead

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection, followed by other vehicles

segments.scene_description: Waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection. The camera has a clear view of the massive construction site ahead, with cars and vans driving past in front. The Hanford sign is visible to the left as the traffic continues to flow through the wide urban intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban intersection through a narrow pedestrian corridor and back into a wide city vista. It begins at a bright crossing marked by a prominent red 35TV billboard, turning left as a dark sedan passes to enter a confined sidewalk flanked by a red brick building. As the camera moves deeper into this corridor, it passes street lamps and scattered debris while digital billboards glow from the buildings across the street and pedestrians drift by. The scene then opens up as the sidewalk ends, leading the camera under a Hanford street sign and toward a red traffic light at a broad intersection. Finally, the view expands to reveal a massive construction site dominated by cranes and complex architecture, with vehicles flowing past in the foreground under the morning light.
